summary.key_theme: 市場對 ServiceNow 即將公布的第二季財報抱持高度期待，儘管面臨 IBM 財報預警帶來的產業連帶下跌壓力，但分析師普遍看好其 AI 轉型與訂閱成長潛力。

bullish.title: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on ServiceNow, Raises Price Target to $140
bullish.reason: Oppenheimer 分析師 Brian Schwartz 維持優於大盤評級並上調目標價，顯示對公司長期成長動能的信心。

bullish.title: TD Cowen Reiterates Buy on ServiceNow, Maintains $140 Price Target
bullish.reason: TD Cowen 分析師 Derrick Wood 重申買入評級，為即將到來的財報提供正面背書。

bullish.title: ServiceNow Seen Well Positioned for Q2 — BNP Paribas says conservative guidance and improving demand could support an earnings beat.
bullish.reason: BNP Paribas 指出保守的財測指引與聯邦政府需求改善，可能成為財報超預期的催化劑。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Is Raising Its AI Targets As Investors Shift Toward Software
bullish.reason: 資金正從 AI 硬體基礎設施轉向應用層軟體，有利於 ServiceNow 的 AI 平台擴張。

bullish.title: The Real Engine Behind ServiceNow Stock Is Its Contract Backlog
bullish.reason: 強調合約積壓量 (Backlog) 作為長期客戶黏著度的基礎，能有效抵銷市場對 AI 破壞性競爭的擔憂。

bullish.title: Tenon Expands Marketing Automation into the ServiceNow AI Platform
bullish.reason: Tenon 整合至 ServiceNow 平台，擴展了行銷自動化功能，增強生態系統價值。

bullish.title: C1Secure Launches SmartRAMP 20x, a ServiceNow-Native Platform Built for the FedRAMP 20x Model
bullish.reason: 原生應用程式的推出有助於鞏固其在聯邦政府市場的合規性與市占率。

bullish.title: Here’s How Much You Would Have Made Owning ServiceNow Stock In The Last 10 Years
bullish.reason: 回顧過去 10 年優於大盤的表現，強化投資人對其長期價值創造的信心。

bearish.title: ADBE, CRM, NOW, MSFT: Software Stocks Fall After IBM Warns Clients Shifting Spending To Servers, Cybersecurity
bearish.reason: IBM 的財報預警引發軟體類股連帶下跌，市場擔憂企業 IT 支出轉向硬體與資安，排擠軟體預算。

bearish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
bearish.reason: 分析指出公司缺乏財報超預期的關鍵要素，暗示財報可能僅符合預期或面臨壓力。

bearish.title: NOW (PSE:NOW) Stock Trades At A Premium Despite A 76% Fall
bearish.reason: 儘管股價已大幅修正，但估值指標仍顯示該股相較於同業偏貴，存在評價修正風險。

bearish.title: Citigroup Maintains Buy on ServiceNow, Lowers Price Target to $156
bearish.reason: 花旗雖維持買入，但下調目標價，反映對短期成長動能的謹慎態度。

bearish.title: ServiceNow Set to Report Q2 Earnings: Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
bearish.reason: 提醒投資人需關注成本上升與競爭加劇對利潤率的潛在侵蝕。

bearish.title: Can ServiceNow (NOW) Trade At A Premium After A 46% Drop?
bearish.reason: 重複提及股價下跌後估值依然過高，反映市場對其獲利成長能否支撐高本益比的疑慮。

neutral.title: UBS Maintains Neutral on ServiceNow, Raises Price Target to $115
neutral.reason: 瑞銀維持中立評級，僅小幅上調目標價，顯示對股價後市看法保守。

neutral.title: UiPath Vs. ServiceNow: Which Agentic AI Stock Is the Better Buy?
neutral.reason: 對比兩家 AI 軟體公司，未給出明確投資建議，僅提供產業觀點。
